\tzpentry{ID5430}{Magnetization Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5430 introduces Magnetization Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} M = T (SO(3) \times R3) u(1)gauge \end{equation}
